item.title: 【ホロライブ】ときのそら、9周年記念イベント「9th Anniversary Party」をぴあアリーナMMで開催決定！「夢は、ひとつ先のステージへ」
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: VTuberグループ・ホロライブ所属の「ときのそら」さんが、自身のX（旧Twitter）および公式情報を更新し、活動9周年を記念するイベント『ときのそら 9th Anniversary Party』の開催を特報として発表しました。開催日は2026年11月7日（土）、会場は数多くのアーティストが伝説を残してきた「ぴあアリーナMM」です。特報を受け、ファン（そらとも）の間では早くも期待の声が高まっています。横浜の地に響き渡る歌声と、記念すべきパーティーがどのようなものになるのか、11月の開催に向けて注目が集まります。『ときのそら 9th Anniversary Party』は、2026年11月7日（土）にぴあアリーナMMにて開催予定です。

item.title: 常闇トワ＆獅白ぼたんのサイン入り色紙が当たる！『灰仭巫覡』新PV＆オリジナルソング公開記念キャンペーン開催
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: 大暮維人先生が描く人気漫画『灰仭巫覡（カイジンフゲキ）』のオリジナルソングと新PVの公開を記念し、2025年9月5日より豪華プレゼントキャンペーンがスタートしました。新PV公開！常闇トワ＆獅白ぼたんが歌うオリジナルソング2025年9月3日、講談社の「マガジンチャンネル」にて『灰仭巫覡』の新たなプロモーションビデオが公開されました。このPVのために書き下ろされたオリジナルソング『君と明かした夜』は、ホロライブ所属の人気VTuberである常闇トワさんと獅白ぼたんさんが歌唱を担当。今回の発表を記念して、抽選で1名様にが当たるキャンペーンが開催されます。『灰仭巫覡』公式X（旧Twitter）アカウント（@KAIJINFUGEKI_WM）をフォロー ※「#灰仭巫覡PV公開」「#カイジンフゲキ」のハッシュタグが付いたポストが目印です。 2025年9月5日（金）0:00 〜 2025年9月14日（日）23:59まで 利用規約に同意し、日本国内にお住まいで郵便物・宅配物の受け取りが可能な方。注意事項：色紙には当選者の宛名が記載されます。当選者にはXのダイレクトメッセージにて連絡があります。 『灰仭巫覡』コミックス第1巻から第5巻まで好評発売中です。

item.title: 【速報】戌神ころね、ホンダのeスポーツ大会アンバサダーに2年連続で就任！→本人も「よろしくお願いします」と意気込み「世界の戌神」「今年もきた！」
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: 人気VTuberグループ「ホロライブ」所属の戌神ころねさんが、本田技研工業（Honda）が主催するeモータースポーツのグローバル大会「Honda Racing eMS 2025」の公式アンバサダーに、昨年に引き続き就任したことが発表されました。このニュースに、ファンからは「2年連続はすごすぎる！」「今年も応援します！」といった声が相次いでいます。「Honda Racing eMS」は、世界3地区（アジア・オセアニア、米州、欧州・中東・アフリカ）のトップドライバーたちが地域最速の座をかけて競い合う、本格的なeモータースポーツのグローバル大会です。戌神さんは「Honda Racing eMS 2024」でもアンバサダーを務めており、今回で2年連続という大役を担うことになります。ゲーム実況で人気を誇る戌神ころねと、世界のHondaとのコラボが再び実現しました。2025年8月26日、Honda Racing eMSの公式X（旧Twitter）アカウントが「━ Honda Racing eMS 2025 開催 ━ 昨年に続き『戌神ころね』が公式アンバサダーに！」とポストし、戌神さんのアンバサダー就任を正式に発表。あわせて、されるという大会スケジュールも公開しました。この公式発表に対し、戌神さん本人も自身のXアカウントで「今年もアンバサダーを務めさせていただきます！よろしくお願いします」と引用ポストし、就任への意気込みを表明しました。この就任のニュースに、ファンからは「世界のHondaに認められた女、戌神ころね」「ころさんの影響力すごい！」「これを機にレースゲームに挑戦してみようかな」など、驚きと喜びのコメントがありました。

item.title: ホロライブ3期生、Kアリーナ横浜で2DAYSライブ開催決定！「#きゅるるん大作戦」チケット受付開始
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: 「ホロライブ」所属の3期生（兎田ぺこら、不知火フレア、白銀ノエル、宝鐘マリン）によるライブイベント「hololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜」を、に「Kアリーナ横浜」にて開催することを発表しました。本ライブは、「ホロライブ」所属の3期生4名が出演するライブイベントです。本日10月19日（日）21:00より、現地会場指定席チケットの1次先行（hololive FANCLUB先行 / 抽選）が開始されるとともに、「ABEMA」「SPWN」「ZAIKO」にて配信チケットの販売も開始されました。チケット情報などライブの最新情報は、下記特設サイト及び開催概要をご確認ください。hololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜 概要 hololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜 主催：カバー株式会社 兎田ぺこら 不知火フレア 白銀ノエル 宝鐘マリンDAY1 ： 2026年1月17日（土） 開場 16:30 / 配信開始 17:30 / 開演 18:00DAY2 ： 2026年1月18日（日） 開場 15:30 / 配信開始 16:30 / 開演 17:00 Kアリーナ横浜 （〒220-8507 神奈川県横浜市西区みなとみらい6丁目2−14） 最寄り駅 〇新高島駅 みなとみらい線4臨港パーク口より徒歩5分 〇みなとみらい駅 みなとみらい線2いちょう通り口より徒歩12分 ※お1人様2枚までお申し込み可能です。 ※チケット氏名印字あり。■1次先行（hololive FANCLUB先行 / 抽選）受付期間：2025年10月19日（日）21:00 ～ 2025年10月29日（水） 23:59当選確認期間・入金期間：2025年11月5日（水）15:00 ～ 2025年11月9日（日）23:00※お申し込みには、hololive FANCLUBへの入会が必要となります。※別途手数料（先行サービス料440円、システム利用料330円、電子チケット利用料110円）がかかります。受付期間：2025年11月13日（木）21:00 ～ 2025年11月23日（日）23:59当選確認期間・入金期間：2025年11月28日（金）15:00 ～ 2025年12月1日（月）23:00※別途手数料（先行サービス料440円、システム利用料330円、電子チケット利用料110円）がかかります。受付期間・発券開始：2025年12月14日（日）12:00 ～※別途手数料（システム利用料330円、電子チケット利用料110円）がかかります。 2025年10月19日（日）21:00 ～ 2026年2月18日（水）20:00 公演終了後、公開準備ができ次第アーカイブ視聴可能となり、2026年2月18日（水）23:59 まで何度でもご視聴いただけます。 ※2026年2月18日（水）23:59 を過ぎると、アーカイブ視聴中でも視聴できなくなります。 ※プラットフォームごとに別途手数料が発生する場合があります。本公演開催に合わせ、本日10月19日（日）よりhololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜のライブグッズが解禁されました。 2025年10月19日（日）21:00 ～ 2025年11月25日（火）18:00 まで販売期間や注意事項・詳細は、公式HPの販売ページなどをご確認ください。

hololive ID 5th Anniversary: The 5-Year Journey of hololive Indonesia
item.author: cover_hirata
item.content:encoded: In True Indonesian Style Backed by Data: Born from a Nation of YouthThe Southeast Asian archipelago made up of over 17,000 islands that is Indonesia is known for being a “nation of youth” where around half of its population is 29 or younger and is also one of the most multilingual countries in the world with over 700 languages spoken nationwide, characterized by its diverse language and culture. Since the second half of the 1980s, popular Japanese anime has been shown in Indonesia, making it a country with a high awareness of Japanese pop culture for some time now, not just anime.It was into this landscape in April 2020 that the first hololive production VTuber group outside of Japan was born with three talents in Generation 1, with 3 more talents following suit in December of the same year as part of Generation 2, doubling the number of unique talents and with it the fan base grew. At that time, those who were aware of hololive within Indonesia were still only those who consumed Japanese anime and had an interest in Japanese culture. However, through constant streaming and activities from Generation 1 and 2 members, this level of interest steadily grew. Then, when Generation 1 talent Moona Hoshinova’s channel became the first in Southeast Asia to reach 1 million subscribers, everything began to change. VTubers were no longer just “novel content for anime lovers,” but were being recognized as individual streamers as internet culture in Indonesia continued to thrive. It was also at this time that we were able to accumulate data, through the activities of Generation 1 and 2 talents, about what genres and music were well-received among Indonesians. Based on this data, from Generation 3, which debuted in March 2022, onwards, we have reflected Indonesian culture and trends more in our audition methods and visuals. As a result, hololive became far more well-known locally with Kobo Kanaeru following in the footsteps of Moona Hoshinova and Kureiji Ollie, becoming the fastest hololive ID to reach 1 million subscribers on her YouTube channel, reaching the milestone in just four months after her channel was created. Following on from this, in August 2022, to mark 7 million subscribers across all hololive ID talents, a commemorative advertisement was put up in Senayan Station, part of the Jakarta subway system (MRT Jakarta). hololive ID talents could be seen throughout the city and were becoming a part of daily life in Indonesia. The VTuber boom in Indonesia and the various challenges posed to previous generations gave us crucial insights into what kind of content and activities are commonly enjoyed locally—from music and gaming genres to communication styles. These learnings have not only heavily influenced how the Generation 3 debut project was managed, but also all hololive ID-related decision-making processes regarding offline events and local promotions ever since.Since 2022, hololive ID talents have featured at the annual hololive SUPER EXPO & fes. in Japan, with their incredible singing ability and dance performances a huge hit among fans. In September 2022, the three Generation 1 talents revealed their 3D models on a relay stream, and increased the scope of their activities that included a tour of Asia* in 2023.*International Event: “VRChat Presents viv:ID CRUISE hololive Meet Asia Tour”Respecting Indonesian Culture: An Appeal Born from a Unique IdentitySo, why have hololive ID talents been so well received by viewers in Indonesia and many other parts of the world? We believe that there are a number of reasons for this. The appeal of VTubers that have the support of a global community stems from the talents all having their own strong individuality, and their ability to have bilateral communication with their viewers. hololive ID adapts this characteristic appeal to suit the Indonesian language and culture. In particular, forms of “wrestling-style” communication between talents and viewers are frequent, where Indonesian slang, known as bahasa gaul, and jokes are used to make jibes at each other, bringing about a closer and more friendly form of interaction with local viewers. Many of the hololive ID members are also multilingual allowing them to “code-switch,” whereby they naturally switch between multiple languages during the same stream, making the group particularly unique with its ambiguous geographical and linguistic boundaries, endearing itself with not only the Indonesian public, but with Japanese and Western fans as well.These strengths are evident in the content of talents’ streams, their fan communities and, above all, their original music.On the musical front, songs like Kobo Kanaeru’s “Oh! Asmara” and Moona Hoshinova’s “Perisai Jitu” are characterized by their Indonesian pop influences, making them highly acclaimed locally in Indonesia. These songs have transcended the VTuber fan base and become huge hits, making waves on the national music streaming charts. On the other hand, other songs feature a blend of multiple languages such as English and Japanese and are being released with a more global audience in mind.The presence of both an approachability stemming from local influences to a universality which resonates with a global audience is what makes hololive ID so unique. hololive ID, with its uniquely Indonesian languages and culture as well as its boldness and individuality that connects with a global audience, has seen its fan base continue to grow, not only within Indonesia but far and wide throughout Japan, South Asia and North America, blossoming into a group boasting diversity even within the production. Each and every talent of hololive ID has been a pioneer in bringing Indonesian culture and VTubers to the global market. Some fans may remember the oddity of anime-looking characters speaking Indonesian in the beginning when hololive ID first became active as a group, but the talents’ efforts to stay true to their culture and values while continuing to produce content that can be enjoyed by anyone regardless of nationality may just be what has made hololive ID so uniquely appealing. Since 2023, the group’s activities have diversified even further through offline events and collaborations with other companies. February 2023 saw all 9 affiliated talents reveal their new kimono outfits on a relay stream, and then in August, they announced their VRChat Presents viv:ID CRUISE hololive Meet Asia Tour, with 4 of the members touring Indonesia, Singapore, Malaysia and New York. This saw a steady increase in offline engagement with fans, with appearances by ID talents at both hololive STAGE World Tour’24 -Soar!- and hololive STAGE World Tour ’25 -Synchronize!- in 2024 and 2025, showcasing their global presence.Collaborations and campaigns domestically with Indonesian businesses have also been well-received. Kureiji Ollie and Kobo Kanaeru made an appearance in a promotion for the staple instant noodles Indomie from Indonesian food/beverage giant Indofood, which originally came about by the brand simply being mentioned on stream, enabling the presence of VTubers to be more widely known outside of original fan communities. Kobo Kanaeru also appeared in a commercial for the Honda BeAT, a popular scooter in Indonesia. A fusion of live-action and 3D elements, the commercial was nominated at the YouTube Works Awards Southeast Asia 2025, winning Best Collaboration: Brand & Creator. On top of this, 2025 also saw a domestic collaboration with Pocky. hololive ID has played a considerable role in not only promoting local companies within the Indonesian market through such campaigns as receiving hololive ID photo cards when purchasing products, but has worked with international companies achieving similar success as well.In November 2025, numerous fans gathered at Comic Frontier 21 ICE BSD Hall 6 for hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary live Chromatic Future, the group’s first-ever concert in Indonesia featuring all hololive ID members to celebrate its 5-year anniversary, which was a resounding success. Five years on, hololive ID has been a social phenomenon going beyond the realm of entertainment; a success story in the digital creation industry in Indonesia made through successes had in music streaming charts and collaborations with other brands. Moving forward, we are looking to expand activities based in Indonesia even further while continuing to collaborate even closer with the entire hololive production.In the second part of this series, we will bring you interviews with event staff who worked on the hugely successful hololive Indonesia 5th Anniversary LIVE Chromatic Future, and share some of the ideas and sentiments that went into the production.

item.title: 角巻わため、20人超え新年会で見せた成長―「昔はコミュ障だった」過去を告白
item.author: 風歌
item.content:encoded: ホロライブ所属の角巻わためさんが自身の配信で、白上フブキさん、大神ミオさん、大空スバルさんが行った”おもてなし凸待ちホロ正月配信”での出来事を振り返りました。20人を超えるメンバーが集まった新年会に参加した角巻さんは、充実した時間を過ごしたことを報告。かつて「コミュ障で喋れなかった」という過去を明かしつつ、今では積極的に会話できるようになった自分の変化を実感したといいます。角巻さんは配信で、新年会の様子を語りました。クリスマスは仕事で忙しく、どこにも行けずケーキもチキンも食べられなかったという寂しい思いをしていたため、今回はようです。角巻さんは、」と語り、。筑前煮、みたらし団子、チップスター、チーズケーキなど、様々な料理を楽しんだといいます。特に筑前煮については、花形に切ってある人参をはじめ、レンコンやこんにゃく、椎茸など多くの食材が入っており、「手間かかってる！」と感心しながらも、 のは内緒だよ新年会では椅子が全員分なく、ビンゴ大会が始まる際にメンバーが集まった時のこと。癒月ちょこさんが椅子に座っていたところ、角巻さんをというエピソードも披露されました。「わためは自分から行くタイプではないので」と前置きしつつ、とドキドキしながら座っていたと告白。ビンゴ大会では、なかなか数字が揃わず「」とブツブツ言っていた様子ですが、その声が周囲にもよく聞こえていたといいます。配信では、こうした大人数のオフコラボに参加できるようになった自分の成長について、昔だったら喋れてなかったと思うんだけど、からいっぱい喋れたさらに「コミュ障の過去知らない」というリスナーのコメントに対し、「昔はコミュ障だった」と回答。そっから多分また喋れなくなったんだよな。これ喋らない方がいいかもってそんな角巻さんを変えたのは、周囲のメンバー達だったといいます。「」と感謝を述べ、「」と語りました。

item.title: 「壁ばかり見てるから心配で…」大空スバル、響咲リオナへの”親心”が爆発 あえて無茶ぶりをした「独り立ち」への深い愛情
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: 「涙がちょちょ切れそうになる」壁を向く後輩・リオナへの想い26人のホロメンが次々と訪れるという大変な企画を終え、「久しぶりにあんな汗かく企画したな」と振り返るスバルさん。自身も緊張していたというこの企画の中で、特に印象に残っているのが響咲リオナさんの存在だったようです。スバルさんは、普段から控えめな性格のリオナさんが頑張って話している姿を見ると「」と語りました。いつもは「壁を向いている」と表現するほど大人しいリオナさんに対し、「大丈夫かお前」と心配しつつも、今回の企画にはスバルさんから「もし良かったらなんだけど来るか？」と事前に声をかけていたことを明かしました。「また”お母さん”なのかもしれねえ」と、自身の感情が母親のような目線になっていることに苦笑いを見せました。あえて厳しく？「DEV_IS」として外の世界へ羽ばたくためになぜ、あえて内向的なリオナさんを大勢の目に触れる場に呼んだのか。その理由についてスバルさんは、今後「hololive DEV_IS」としての活動が広がっていくことを見据えた、先輩としての愛ある厳しさだったと語ります。ホロライブというグループの中にいるうちは先輩たちがカバーできるものの、今後案件やイベントなどで外部へ行く機会が増えれば、一人で立ち回らなければならない日が来ます。「リオナ、お前そろそろね、3Dももらったし、独り立ちの時が来てるぞ」この考えに至った背景には、スバルさん自身の経験があります。デビュー当時は何もできず、多くの先輩に面倒を見てもらってここまで来られたという感謝があるからこそ、「次は自分が後輩にしてあげる番だ」という意識が芽生えているようです。また、リオナさんが「今年はコミュ障を治す」と目標を掲げていることについても触れました。スバルさんは、リオナさんのいわゆる”コミュ障”は、単に話せないわけではなく、周りに気を使いすぎることによるものだと分析。「」と肯定しました。かつて自身が何も考えずに発言して「失言王」になりかけた過去を引き合いに出し、「気遣いができることは素晴らしいこと」と、後輩の慎重な性格を尊重しつつエールを送りました。先輩としての責任感と、後輩への温かい眼差しが伝わってきた今回の振り返り配信。スバルさんの「親心」を受け、響咲リオナさんが今後どのような成長を見せてくれるのか楽しみです。

item.title: 【ホロライブ】兎田ぺこら、『ポケモン クリスタル』5時間の激闘が“全消滅” 人生縛り配信でまさかの「電池切れ」結末に
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: VTuberグループ・ホロライブ所属の兎田ぺこらさんが1月10日、自身のYouTubeチャンネルにて『ポケットモンスター クリスタルバージョン』の実況配信を実施。しかし、レトロゲーム特有のトラブルにより、すべてのプレイデータが失われるという衝撃的な結末を迎えました。この日の配信でぺこらさんは、瀕死になったポケモンを二度と使用できないという高難易度ルール「人生縛り」を掲げてゲームをスタートしました。相棒には草タイプの「チコリータ（ニックネーム：チータロウ）」を選択。不利と言われる草タイプを選びながらも、持ち前のゲームセンスで順調に進行し、ジムバッジを2つ獲得するまで誰も失うことなく進めていました。懐かしの名作を楽しむぺこらさんの様子に、コメント欄も大いに盛り上がりを見せていました。悲劇が起きたのは配信開始から約5時間が経過した頃でした。ゲーム内でレポート（セーブ）を行おうとしたところ、正常に記録ができない事態が発生。原因はゲームソフト（カートリッジ）の「内蔵電池切れ」でした。ゲームボーイカラー時代のソフトは、セーブデータを保持するためにカートリッジ内の電池を使用しており、これが切れていると電源を切った瞬間にデータが消えてしまいます。結果として、ジムリーダーを倒し、仲間を育て上げた5時間の冒険は幻となってしまいました。◆「数年後にリベンジさせて」ファンからは励ましと笑い配信終了後、ぺこらさんは自身のX（旧Twitter）を更新。「申し訳ございません…内蔵電池が切れておりレポートが書けない状況ぺこでした；；」とファンに謝罪し、「数年後にリベンジさせてください！」と、電池交換など準備を整えての再挑戦を誓いました。このあまりにレトロゲームらしいな幕切れに、ファンからは「これぞぺこーら」「セーブの大切さを学んだ」「悲しいけど笑ってしまった」といった反響が寄せられています。レトロゲーム配信ならではのハプニングでしたが、次回のリベンジ配信では万全の状態で「チータロウ」との再会が見られることを期待しましょう。

item.title: 【2026年01月11日】ホロライブ イベント告知ポストまとめ
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: xより2026年01月11日にポスト・リポストされた内容を元にイベントの内容に絞ってご紹介します。膨大なポストを遡っている故、見逃してしまっているイベントもあるかと思いますがご容赦ください。9th Anniversary Party開催決定2026年11月7日(土)、ぴあアリーナMMにて「ときのそら 9th Anniversary Party」の開催が発表されました。キャッチコピーは「夢は、ひとつ先のステージへ。」です。1月11日19:00より「はじめの日2026」としてホロライブ歌枠の配信が行われます。新曲MVの公開や、その他発表も予定されているとのことです。MMORPG「幻想神域 Echo of Cube」コラボ配信1月11日(日)21:00より、MMORPG「幻想神域 Echo of Cube」のPR配信が行われます。序盤のメインストーリープレイや、協力プレイでのダンジョン挑戦が予定されています。NHKラジオ第1にて放送の「ぶいあーる！」にレギュラーMCとして出演。ゲストにはにじさんじ所属の緑仙、ギルザレンIII世が登場しました。1月11日(日)13:00より、GeoGuessrで100回正解するまで終わらない耐久配信が行われます。100GUESS達成後の最後に「告知」があることが予告されています。

item.title: 【ホロライブ】大神ミオ、トワ・すいせい・姉街との「九州旅行」エピソードを披露！ トワ様の“鬼教官”ぶりやまさかの事故も
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: ホロライブ所属のVTuber大神ミオさんが、動画内でメンバーとのプライベート旅行のエピソードを語りました。常闇トワさん、星街すいせいさん、そしてすいせいさんの実姉である「姉街」さんという異色の4人組で九州へ向かった一行。行き当たりばったりの珍道中や、車内で発揮されたトワさんの意外な一面など、仲の良さが伝わる旅行となりました。ホロライブゲーマーズの大神ミオさんが、自身の配信枠で先日行ってきたという九州旅行の裏話を披露しました。メンバーはミオさん、常闇トワさん、星街すいせいさん、そして姉街（星街すいせいの姉）さんという、本人曰く。ハウステンボスと博多を目的に長崎へ降り立った4人ですが、実は飛行機と宿以外はほぼノープラン。現地での移動手段すら決めておらず、急遽レンタカーを借りることに。運転手には大神ミオさんが立候補しましたが、ここで意外な才能を発揮したのが助手席に座った常闇トワさんでした。 トワさんは「ミオちゃん、次何メートル先で右だから右車線入っておいて」「車間距離気をつけてね」と、まるで鬼教官のようにテキパキと指示出し。ミオさんもと、その頼もしさを絶賛していました。道中ではAIならではのハプニングも発生。 車のナビの音声認識機能を使って目的地「ハウステンボス」を設定しようとしたところ、あろうことかナビが「天国に行きたい」と誤認識。 これには車内も騒然とし、と音声入力を諦める事態となり、笑いに包まれたようです。4人乗り自転車で柵に激突？ ハウステンボスでの悲劇無事にハウステンボスに到着した一行は、広大な敷地を移動するために4人乗りの自転車をレンタル。 しかし、路面が荒れていた場所でハンドルを取られてしまい、そのまま柵に突っ込んでしまうというアクシデントが発生。と振り返るミオさんですが、そんなトラブルも含めて景色や散策を楽しんだ様子でした。佐世保バーガーをシェアハピ、BGM担当はすいちゃんその後は博多へ移動し、もつ鍋や明太子などのグルメを満喫。 移動中の車内では、どうしても佐世保バーガーが食べたいという星街すいせいさんがダッシュでバーガーを買いに行き、みんなでシェアしながら食べたというほっこりエピソードも。 運転中はすいせいさんがDJとなって好きな音楽を流し、トワさんがナビをし、後部座席で姉街さんが乗っているという、賑やかで自由なドライブ旅行となったようです。大神ミオさんはと満足げに語り、配信を締めくくりました。

item.title: ホロライブが東京駅一番街に登場！2026年新春ポップアップショップ開催情報
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: カバー株式会社が運営する「ホロライブプロダクション」のオフィシャルポップアップショップが、2026年1月9日（金）より東京駅一番街にて期間限定で開催されます。今回は、描き下ろしイラストを使用したグッズ販売に加え、購入者特典の配布や会場限定の特別装飾などが実施されます。ホロライブ、ホロライブインドネシア、ホロライブEnglishから計11名のタレントが参加するイベントの内容をまとめました。まずは忙しい方向けに、開催期間や場所などの基本情報を箇条書きでまとめます。イベント名：hololive production OFFICIAL POP UP SHOP開催期間：2026年1月9日（金）～ 1月22日（木）営業時間：10:00 ～ 20:30（※最終日1月22日のみ18:00終了）入場方法：特定日時は事前抽選予約制（LivePocket利用）特典：期間により絵柄が変わるポストカードなど全4種今回のポップアップショップには、以下の11名が参加します。グループの垣根を超えたラインナップとなっています。ホロライブ（0期生）：ときのそら / ロボ子さん / AZKi / さくらみこ / 星街すいせいホロライブインドネシア：アユンダ・リス / ムーナ・ホシノヴァ / アイラニ・イオフィフティーンホロライブEnglish：森カリオペ / 小鳥遊キアラ / 一伊那尓栖混雑を避けるため、初日や週末を含む特定の日時では「LivePocket」を使用した事前抽選による予約制が導入されます。以下の日時に来場を予定している方は、必ず申し込み期間や注意事項をご確認ください。※上記以外の時間帯や平日については自由に入場できる可能性がありますが、混雑状況によっては整理券の配布などが行われる場合があります。詳しくは公式サイトや各予約ページをご確認ください。期間中、店舗にて商品を購入された方を対象に、さまざまなノベルティが用意されています。特に「ポストカード」と「クリアカード」は開催期間の前半と後半で絵柄が切り替わるため注意が必要です。オリジナルショッパー（全1種） メッセージカード（全3種 / ランダム） ポストカード（全11種 / ランダム） クリアカード（全11種 / ランダム） ※すべての特典は先着順となり、なくなり次第終了となります。物販エリアだけでなく、東京駅一番街全体を使った展示企画も行われます。：参加タレントたちが起用された特別装飾がストリートを彩ります。：描き下ろしイラストを使用した等身大パネルが展示され、フォトスポットとしても楽しめます。：購入特典として配布される「メッセージカード」にタレントへの応援メッセージを記入し、その場でメッセージボードに貼ることができます。ファン同士の交流や記念撮影も楽しめるイベントとなっていますので、東京駅にお立ち寄りの際はぜひ足を運んでみてはいかがでしょうか。

item.title: YouTubeチャンネル登録者数270万人超えの大人気VTuber・兎田ぺこらの生誕を記念し初のソロ…
【ホロライブ】兎田ぺこら、サカナクション・山口一郎のゲーム配信に衝撃「今年のライバルは…」 一流アーティストの“配信者”としての姿勢に感銘
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: ホロライブ所属のVTuber兎田ぺこらさんが、9日の配信中にロックバンド「サカナクション」の山口一郎さんのゲーム実況を視聴した際のエピソードを披露。一流アーティストが見せた意外な一面と、配信者としての姿勢に感銘を受けたことを明かしました。VTuberグループ・ホロライブ所属の「兎田ぺこら」さんが、自身の配信枠にてサカナクションのボーカル・山口一郎さんのYouTube活動について言及。「勉強になった」「相手がデカすぎる」とその衝撃を語りました。◆スーパーチャットへの丁寧な対応に「気を引き締めなきゃ」ぺこらさんは最近、山口一郎さんがYouTubeでゲーム配信を行っていることを知り、視聴したとのこと。そこでまず驚かされたのが、視聴者への対応の丁寧さでした。山口さんはゲームプレイ中であっても、スーパーチャット（投げ銭）が送られるたびに「〇〇さんありがとうございます」と即座に反応し、丁寧に読み上げていたといいます。これを見たぺこらさんは「ぺこらも読める時は読むようにしているけど、もっとちゃんとしなきゃと気付かされた」と反省。自身も配信活動に長く携わっていますが、改めて初心を思い出し、気を引き締めるきっかけになったと語りました。◆「格好つけてると思ってた」アーティストの意外なハイテンションまた、配信中の山口さんのテンションの高さにも驚愕したといいます。ぺこらさんが視聴した際、山口さんはアクションパズルゲーム『Human: Fall Flat』をプレイ中でした。ぺこらさんは当初、一流アーティストの配信ということで「格好つけたり、気取ったりしているのかな？」という先入観を持っていたそうです。しかし実際には、「乗ってけ、乗ってけ！」とハイテンションで叫びながら、ふにゃふにゃのキャラクターを操作して楽しそうに遊ぶ姿がありました。そのギャップに対し「全然そんなことなかった。楽しそうにやっていてびっくりした」とコメント。アーティストとしてだけでなく、一人のゲーマーとして純粋に楽しむ姿に好感を抱いたようです。◆「今年のライバルはサカナクション？」芸能界からの参入に危機感も配信の最後には、昨今のYouTube事情についても言及。「今まではテレビに出ている芸能人と、ネットで活動する自分たちは別枠だと思っていた」と吐露しつつ、有名人が当たり前のように配信界に進出してくる現状に「正直、生配信ですらヤバいぜ」と危機感を募らせました。「今年のライバルはサカナクションか……いや、デカすぎ。相手がデカすぎる」と笑いを誘いつつも、業界の変化を肌で感じている様子のぺこらさん。最後には「『宝島』の時の掛け声を生で聴いてみたい」と、サカナクションのライブへの憧れも口にし、「死ぬまでに一度は行ってみたい」とリスペクトを送っていました。

item.title: 「一番くじ ホロライブ ～Villain Style～」が2026年1月10日より発売決定！
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: VTuberグループ「ホロライブ」の新たな一番くじ、「一番くじ ホロライブ ～Villain Style～」の発売が決定しました！今回のテーマは「Villain Style」。いつもとは一味違った、ダークで魅力的なホロライブメンバーの姿が描かれることが期待されます。ファンにとっては見逃せないラインナップとなりそうです。 一番くじ ホロライブ ～Villain Style～ 2026年01月10日(土)より順次発売予定

item.title: ときのそら、史上最大規模のワンマンライブを東京国際フォーラムで開催決定！「夢が叶った！」「絶対行く！」とファン歓喜
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: ホロライブプロダクション所属のVTuber「ときのそら」さんが、自身の活動史上最大規模となるワンマンライブの開催を発表。 ホロライブ0期生としてVTuberシーンの黎明期から業界を牽引してきた「ときのそら」さんが、にて、ワンマンライブ「New Year’s Party 2026『Dreams in Motion』」を開催することを発表しました。ときのそらさんにとって史上最大規模となる本公演でSNSではファンから「国際フォーラムはすごすぎる！」「そらちゃんの夢がまた一つ叶う瞬間に立ち会えるなんて…」といった歓喜の声が相次ぎました。“そらとも”と共に描く「Dreams in Motion」今回のライブは、ときのそらさんが毎年開催している恒例のニューイヤーパーティ、通称「そらぱ」の特別版。公演タイトルの「Dreams in Motion（ドリームズ・イン・モーション）」には、夢に向かって歩み続けるときのそらさん自身と、その姿を見守り、応援し続けるファン＝“そらとも”の想いが込められているとのこと。本公演は、昼公演＜Day＞と夜公演＜Night＞の2部構成で開催。それぞれ異なる演出が期待されています。チケットは、最前エリアが確約され、Tシャツや無線制御ペンライト、限定ボイスなどの豪華特典が付いたSS席（¥18,800）から、学生にも優しい学割チケット（¥5,150）まで、幅広い券種が用意されています。また、遠方のファンに向けた配信チケットも販売され、こちらも限定グッズ付きのプランが用意されるなど、すべての“そらとも”が楽しめる配慮がなされています。

item.title: 【ホロライブ】さくらみこ、罰ゲームの『Jump King』を33時間越えで完全制覇！次は“失踪”していた『エルデンリング』を最初から
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: ホロライブ所属のVTuber・さくらみこさんが1月9日、高難易度アクション『Jump King』をついにクリアしました。年末から続いていた罰ゲーム企画を見事完遂し、次なる挑戦として『ELDEN RING（エルデンリング）』の再走を宣言しています。VTuberグループ「ホロライブ」所属のさくらみこさんが1月9日、自身のYouTubeチャンネルでの配信にて、高難易度で知られるアクションゲーム『Jump King』をクリアしました。本企画は、2025年末に行われたゲーム対決の「罰ゲーム」としてスタートしたものですが、最終的には33時間を超える壮絶な内容となりました。リオナとの「GOD並走」敗北から始まった地獄の登山今回の『Jump King』挑戦は、2025年12月30日に実施された「GOD並走対決」が発端です。対戦相手であるリオナさんとの勝負に敗れたさくらみこさんは、罰ゲームとしてこの“登頂”を開始。年末年始をまたいで行われた配信は、幾度もの落下と沼を繰り返す過酷なものとなりました。1月9日、ついに頂上へ到達したさくらみこさん。クリア画面に表示されたリザルトは、その激闘ぶりを物語っていました。約5万回ものジャンプと、3,800回近い落下。心が折れそうになる局面を何度も乗り越え、頂上にいる「ぴちぴちギャル」との対面を果たしました。コメント欄では「みこちおめでとう！」「諦めない心がすごすぎる」と、長時間の激闘を称える声が多数寄せられています。次は“失踪復活シリーズ”！ 『エルデンリング』を最初から感動のフィナーレを迎えたのも束の間、さくらみこさんは今後の配信予定について驚きの発表を行いました。次にプレイするのは、フロム・ソフトウェアのアクションRPG『ELDEN RING（エルデンリング）』。実は以前、クリア直前まで進めていながら、諸事情により配信が止まってしまっていたタイトルです。今回はその続きからではなく、「復活シリーズ」と銘打ち、とのこと。『Jump King』で鍛え上げられた不屈の精神で、狭間の地を攻略できるのか。さくらみこさんの新たな「全ロス」と「勝利」の冒険に注目が集まります。

item.title: 【ホロライブ】兎田ぺこら、3期生ライブの収録裏話でスタッフからまさかの配慮？「エッチな感じだけど大丈夫ですか」
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: ホロライブ所属のVTuber兎田ぺこらさんが、1月8日の配信で、もうすぐ開催される3期生ライブの準備中にあったスタッフとのやり取りについて話しました。VTuberグループ・ホロライブの兎田ぺこらさんが1月8日、自身の配信で来週末に開催される『hololive 3rd Generation Live #きゅるるん大作戦 〜最強アイドル、推すしかないでしょ〜』に向けた収録の裏話を披露しました。その中でも特に注目を集めているのが、レコーディング時のスタッフとのやり取りです。1月17日・18日にKアリーナ横浜で開催される3期生ライブの準備として、ある楽曲のコーラス収録を行っていた時のお話です。ぺこらさんによると、その曲は「とある方」のカバー曲で、コーラス部分を自分で歌う必要があったとのこと。その時、スタッフからおそるおそる確認が入ったそうです。その曲のコーラスには少し色っぽいニュアンスが含まれていたようで、スタッフは「本人の音源を使うのでも全然大丈夫ですけど」と、ぺこらさんが歌いたくなければ無理に歌わなくても良いと提案してくれたそうです。これに対してぺこらさんは、と即答したといいます。ぺこらさんは当時を振り返り、「そうやって気遣われることあるんだと思ったよね。普通に当たり前にコーラス録るかなと思ったけど」と、スタッフの配慮に驚いた様子。この珍しいやり取りを、「ライブ前でもネタバレにならないかな」と確認した上で、リスナーに共有しました。また、気になるライブのセットリスト（曲目）についても触れられました。具体的に何の曲を歌うかは明かしませんでしたが、「24時間配信の休憩中とかに流れてた曲は、まあやるのかもね。わからないけど」と、ぼかしたコメントを残しています。以前行った長時間配信の休憩時間に流していたMVや楽曲の中に、今回のライブで歌う曲が含まれている可能性をほのめかしました。「まあそれはみんなに聴いといてもらいたい」と予習を勧めつつも、「セットリストを言うと怒られる。情報漏洩でクビになっちゃう」と笑いながら、当日までのお楽しみであることを強調しました。

Tokino Sora New Year’s Party 2026 “Dreams in Motion” Support Campaign in Holoearth Announcement
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!Starting Thursday, January 8, 2026, we are holding a support campaign for Tokino Sora New Year’s Party 2026 “Dreams in Motion” in Holoearth! During the campaign period, a street takeover featuring the concert’s key visual will be held, and items such as a new T-shirt will also be available for purchase in Holoearth.Be sure to come by and show your support! (Schedule is subject to change.) Anyone can join in the festivities for free by downloading and installing Holoearth. (Note: Holoearth is available only for Windows.)The support campaign includes a street takeover featuring the concert’s key visual & the illustration for “Pulse” in Alternative City.“Dreams in Motion” Commemorative ItemsNew items were added to the “hololive production official shop in HOLOEARTH”. A T-shirt featuring the concert key visual will be included, as well as the return of the popular Tokino Sora “Sync Hoodie” and “Sync Cap”! (Schedule is subject to change.) ・Tokino Sora “Dreams in Motion” T ・Tokino Sora Sync Hoodie (Blk / Pk) ・Tokino Sora Sync Cap (Blk / Pk)In addition, pathfinder items inspired by Tokino Sora are also for sale! January 8, 2026 (Thu) after maintenance. ・Pathfinder Jacket Tokino Sora ・Pathfinder Sneakers Tokino Sora

item.title: “NePoLaBo Live Preview Area” Special Opening & 10-Second Video Contest Announcement
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!In addition, we are accepting entries for the “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live 10-Second Video Contest”! We look forward to seeing short videos of your favorite NePoLaBo Live scenes from the full performance!“NePoLaBo Live Preview Area” Free Entry Area Now Open!This area is a free-to-enter experience area. Even those experiencing Holoearth for the first time can participate using a PC (Windows).Come meet NePoLaBo in Holoearth! Anyone can join in the festivities for free by downloading and installing Holoearth. (Note: Holoearth is available only for Windows.)10-Second Video Contest Start!hololive 5th Generation “NePoLaBo” (Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan)Selected outstanding entries will be specially featured on the official website, and winners will also receive a commemorative digital in-app prize: The “NePoLaBo Live Celebration T All Members Ver. (Signed)” (Schedule is subject to change.) From the Options menu, please toggle OFF “NaviRobo” and “User names”. Record the video at a resolution of 1920×1080 pixels (Full HD) or higher. The submission must be a video 10 seconds or less, with in-concert audio, clipped from the full performance of “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live.” Post the video on X with the following hashtag (submit as many times as you like): #NePoLaBoHoloearthLive Edits and combining multiple scenes together will not be accepted. Only a single scene may be used (no editing). Using videos or materials external to this performance will not be accepted. Please use the original audio from the selected scene as-is. Audio editing, processing, or adding other audio sources is prohibited.

item.title: 星街すいせい、新曲「月に向かって撃て」が新作アニメ『真夜中ハートチューン』OPテーマに決定！
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: ホロライブ所属のVTuber、星街すいせいの新曲「月に向かって撃て」が、2026年1月より放送開始となるTVアニメ『真夜中ハートチューン』のオープニングテーマ（OP）に決定したことが発表されました。本日、TVアニメ『真夜中ハートチューン』の公式X（旧Twitter）アカウント（@anime_mayochu）にてPV第2弾が公開され、あわせて主題歌情報が解禁となりました。星街すいせいが歌う「月に向かって撃て」が、本作のオープニングを飾ります。なお、エンディングテーマ（ED）はSoalaさんの「声の軌跡」に決定しています。TVアニメ『真夜中ハートチューン』は、2026年1月6日(火)23時より、カンテレ・フジテレビ系全国ネット“火アニバル!!”枠、BS朝日ほかにて放送開始予定です。

item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!From January 1 until January 13, 2026, footage of “Yamato Phantasia,” which was held in Holoearth two summers ago, will be shown on the large theater screen in Kyo-no-Miyako. This New Year, come relive that excitement once again in Holoearth. (Schedule is subject to change.) Anyone can join in the festivities for free by downloading and installing Holoearth. (Note: Holoearth is available only for Windows.)

item.title: 2026 New Year’s Greetings: Holoearth Management Letter
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Happy New Year everyone! This is the Holoearth project lead, Ikko Fukuda.I would like to express my sincere gratitude to everyone for their continued support of Holoearth.Thanks to your warm encouragement, Holoearth was able to officially launch as Version 1.0.0 on April 24, 2025.With the goal of providing an experience where talents from hololive production and users can meet in the same space, and of further expanding the opportunities for talents to shine, we have continued development and regular updates.This event was not a conventional streamed digital performance, but rather it was designed as a new experience where you actually enter the world where the talents are and actually see them at the venue.We have previously taken on virtual event challenges, such as the “Protolive” in December 2022 and “Protolive #2: ~Yamato Phantasia~” in July 2023. With this latest performance, however, we were able to achieve a significant evolution across every aspect of the experience, bringing greater immersion with the talent models, enhanced graphics, full virtual immersion, and an overall leap forward in quality.Unlike traditional streamed performances, this event offered: ・The ability to meet the talents in the same space. ・Deep immersion, allowing viewing from any angle at close range in 360 degrees. ・A spatial performance that would be impossible to realize at a real-world concert. ・The ability to participate again through a “3D archive” that preserves the entire event space.We believe we were able to deliver a completely new form of concert experience—one that represents the unique value only Holoearth can provide.Currently, “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” is available to re-experience as a 3D archive until Wednesday, January 21 at 23:59 (JST). Whether you have yet to experience it or have already participated, we hope you enjoy discovering something new that is uniquely your own. No VR equipment is necessary, only a Windows PC.In addition, for those who do not have a system to join via Holoearth, we are also offering the conventional archived streaming options via the SPWN and ZAIKO platforms. Be sure to check out the powerful visuals made possible by the meticulously crafted camera work from our operations staff—an appeal unique to the streamed version.“NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” special website.As the first piece of news for 2026, we are pleased to announce that the avatars of all talents belonging to hololive production have been implemented in Holoearth. With this, whenever the talents log into Holoearth, they can visit this world at any time in their own true form.Not only during concerts and events—there may also be moments when a talent casually drops by just to hang out.This implementation goes beyond simply adding avatars. It signifies that the most important foundation has been put in place to expand each talent’s new basis for activities.Toward concerts, events, and entirely new kinds of encounters—please look forward to the future developments of Holoearth that begin from here.In 2026, we will further enhance the concert and event experiences where users can meet talents in Holoearth, and we will also work on expanding the “play environment” so that even more people can participate.We are currently preparing a cloud gaming system that allows those without a PC or those using a Mac to easily join events through a web browser. In addition to this, we are also progressing with the development of a version for mobile platforms.In 2026, we will continue to create and deliver experiences that are unique to meeting talents—experiences that are different from YouTube streams or real-world events—together with everyone.We look forward to your continued support of Holoearth in 2026.

item.title: ホロライブ、年末恒例のカウントダウンライブ開催決定！ 発表に「これがないと年越せない！」
item.author: ホロミ
item.content:encoded: VTuber事務所「ホロライブプロダクション」は9月5日、公式X（旧Twitter）にて、年末恒例の大型ライブ『hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025▷2026』を、2025年12月31日（水）に開催することを発表した。この待望のニュースに、ファンからは「やっぱりこれがないと年は越せない！」「全編無料はありがたすぎる」といった喜びの声が殺到している。年末の風物詩！所属タレントがほぼ総出演する豪華ライブホロライブプロダクションが毎年大晦日に開催するカウントダウンライブは、所属タレントが一堂に会する、まさしく”お祭り”と呼ぶにふさわしい一大イベントだ。ホロライブ、ホロスターズの所属タレントのほぼ全員が3Dで出演し、オリジナル曲やこの日限りの特別ユニットによるパフォーマンスを全編無料で配信。年々スケールアップする圧巻のクオリティと、幸福感に満ちた演出で世界中のファンを魅了してきた。昨年開催された『hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2024▷2025』では、60名を超えるタレントが出演。バラエティ企画満載の『ゆくホロくるホロ』からライブ本編へと繋がる構成で、ファンを飽きさせない工夫が凝らされていた。今年も同様の形式が期待されており、どのタレントがどんな楽曲を披露するのか、期待が高まっている。この発表に、ファンからは「うおおおお！今年も来た！生きる理由をありがとう！」「毎年クオリティが上がり続けてるから今年も楽しみすぎる」「全編無料…？ホロライブの福利厚生、手厚すぎ！」「大晦日の予定、即決しました」といった歓喜のコメントが殺到。また、「推しと推しのユニットが見たい！」「今年はどんな絡みがあるかな？」など、具体的なパフォーマンス内容を予想し、胸を膨らませる声も多く見られた。

item.title: NePoLaBo Live Photo Contest Results
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!We are pleased to announce the results of the photo contest for the December 21, 2025 virtual concert “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live.” Thank you for the many great submissions! All of the entries that conveyed the love for NePoLaBo and the passion of the performance moved the entire staff.After a careful review, the winning entries that shone especially brightly have been selected and are presented here. They are also posted on bulletin boards in Alternative City in Holoearth, so be sure to check them out!This composition, emphasizing the bond between Nene and all the Nekko fans, captured our hearts!This shot powerfully captures the charm of Nene the idol!Polka is looking at me! This shot really shows the sense of presence that makes you feel you are really there with the talent!It is moving to see Polka giving such an intense, passionate performance before her fans!A focus on Lamy unique to viewing in Holoearth! The sense and creativity here are amazing!A stunningly beautiful shot packed with Lamy’s beauty and cuteness!A cute, dynamic shot capturing the ever-energetic Botan! Very kawaii!Botan locking eyes with her sharp, cool gaze! Absolutely captivating!This shot perfectly captures the close bond between the four members of NePoLaBo!Another brilliant shot that makes you feel the charm of the four as performers!Holoearth Tourism Agency Honorable MentionAlthough it did not meet certain entry requirements and could not be selected, we were blown away by this unique composition idea and decided to give it an honorable mention! (The honorary mention is featured only in this article.)

item.title: A Quick Little Dev Blog
item.content:encoded: Hello everyone!This is Kay Yu, the lead developer of HoloCure and I wanted to write this little blog(?) post to speak directly with you all. Because it has been since the past update, and as this year comes to a close, I decided I wanted to talk about the game, the update, and whatever else! I'm kinda just writing this on a whim, so please excuse me if it's not organized, this is just sorta me rambling and I'm just going to say whatever comes to mind. This is a first for me as I'm just writing here on this game's steam page and not on any other social media (I've essentially quit twitter as of now, which was my only other place I talked about the game before).First of all, thank you very much for your continued support as usual, to those that still play the game, and those who are looking forward to the next update. Let me confirm that yes, we are still very actively working on the next update, albeit slower than before. The next update, 0.8, is also a fairly large update. There will be a lot of balance updates this time around as I am trying to fix and clean up the main game more. (Note: I promise there are no plans of nerfing any character.) There is a bigger focus on making the main game experience better as opposed to update 0.7 where there was a large focus on side content. Update 0.8 will bring a number of new mechanics, new types of content, and some other changes to the main game overall. And yes, we are also reworking achievements for 0.8 - separating out achievements that aren't for the main game, so that the achievements on Steam will strictly all be main game content only. These will be considered as the real achievements, whereas any side content achievement will become a separate sub-section. For the rest of the changes, I won't reveal too much right now as I'm still trying to make sure these updates and changes are solid. I also want to acknowledge that update 0.8 is taking much longer than I planned. A lot of that is my own fault, so I do apologize for the time it has already taken. As some may know, game development is only a personal hobby for me, and I can only afford to work on HoloCure when I have free time. Over the past 3-4 years of working on this game, my work obligations in my career as an animator in the anime industry has grown exponentially. That's both a good thing and bad of course. Good for my overall career, but bad for anything else in my life that isn't work. As I continue to strive to become a better animator and receive bigger opportunities, it has become much harder to find spare time to dedicate to HoloCure development. I care a lot about both my career as an animator but also my game projects as a hobby game developer, so it becomes hard to juggle both, and I can't ignore either of my passions. I want to explain this in hopes that people can at least understand and be aware why updates take so long, and do not think we aren't trying to update the game anymore. We very much are! This also applies to some of the other people on the team that regularly help out. The other programmers and other creatives have more things going on in their own lives too since we started this project, which is great for them of course! For this next update though, I brought on a significant number of new helpers for some big features. In the end, things will still always take time because everyone has their own obligations and we need to take the time to make sure things work well.I really did try my best to get this update out within this year, but as time went on and my work in the anime industry became more serious, it became harder to finish the update in 2025 and I really did not want to rush things. I want update 0.8 to be a memorable one, so I want to make sure we take out time and create something special - or at least we strive to!But it's not like we haven't made any progress throughout the year. We're a pretty good ways into it and we're getting closer and closer to completing the update. It's just a matter of time and I hope I can ask you all to be patient with us once more. Lately I've been watching older streams or videos of people playing HoloCure. It's both super re-invigorating to continue working on the game, and also very educational as it helps me find any pain-points of the game where the experience could be better. So while we've taken a long time working on update 0.8, I also thought we might as well take the time to finally address a bunch of pretty old issues that we've pushed off in the past. Again, I want update 0.8 to be an important one! If you've taken the time to read this message, I truly thank you for your time and patience with us. One of my goals for 2026 is to balance my schedule better so I can dedicate more time and be more efficient to working on HoloCure. I'm already backing out of a lot of projects I didn't really need to be involved with in the anime industry. There's so much I still want to do for not just HoloCure, but my other game projects - and I absolutely plan to. So until then, I hope you all will come back and enjoy this game for yet another update in the coming future. Thank you and Have a Happy New Year!

item.title: Monday, December 29, 2025 at 3:56 AM EST
Mining Base Reveals hololive English Collaboration Gaming PC Collection
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: December 29, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced a new merchandise collaboration with Mining Base Co., Ltd in partnership with hololive production, featuring talents from hololive English -Myth- and hololive English -Promise-.This collaboration introduces a special series of hololive English collaboration PC products, combining Mining Base’s advanced PC hardware expertise with designs inspired by the worlds and personalities of hololive English talents. Each item is crafted to deliver both high performance and strong visual presence, staying true to Astromeda’s concept of “gaming PCs designed to be displayed.”The lineup includes a wide range of items, from fully built PCs to customizable accessories, allowing fans to enjoy the collaboration at multiple levels.For more information, please visit Mining Base’s official website and social media platforms. 7 models × 2 versions: Myth / Promise Mini Rubber Type (Each available in Myth / Promise designs)・ Interchangeable Panel Sets 2 types: Myth / Promise 2 types: Myth / Promise From December 29, 2025 to December 29, 2026 Worldwide excluding Mainland ChinaAstromeda is a gaming PC brand launched in 2018, created to redefine the image of gaming PCs as part of interior design rather than devices hidden under desks. From its early days, Astromeda gained attention for its industry leading illuminated designs, transforming the conventional perception of gaming PCs as plain and invisible.In recent years, Astromeda has actively developed collaboration models with various IPs, popular anime, and game titles, leveraging its unique design philosophy and craftsmanship. These special edition PCs, carefully designed to reflect each collaboration’s world and aesthetic, have received high praise from fans.With the concept of “a gaming PC you want to place on your desk,” Astromeda continues to focus not only on performance, but also on the value of visual appeal, aiming to make everyday PC life more enjoyable and more personal.

item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!The event “hololive production COUNTDOWN LIVE 2025▷2026,” presented by hololive production on December 31, 2025, will also be streamed within Holoearth. Enjoy watching the show together and spend the final moments of 2025 in Holoearth! (Schedule is subject to change.) Anyone can join in the festivities for free by downloading and installing Holoearth. (Note: Holoearth is available only for Windows.)Starting at 18:00 (JST) on Sunday, December 28, 2025, Kyo-no-Miyako will reopen for a limited time. New additions include photo spots and a large theater screen for simultaneous viewing. At the shrine filled with a New Year’s atmosphere, be sure to draw an “omikuji” fortune and try your luck for 2026. (Schedule is subject to change.)New Shop: “Gofukuya Tsubaki”A new avatar fashion shop, “Gofukuya Tsubaki,” will open in Kyo-no-Miyako. Enjoy the New Year in Holoearth wearing gorgeous outfits inspired by traditional Japanese aesthetics. item.title: The Guardians Behind the Scenes: Moderators Who Keep hololive production Safe Around the Clock
item.author: 平松梨沙
item.content:encoded: The core principles for moderators at hololive production are very simple: “Respect what our viewers have to say” and “Always try to find a reason to keep a comment whenever possible.”While it may seem simple to identify potential sources of controversy or harmful remarks and respond accordingly, such work has become increasingly complex in light of recent social diversity. A statement that feels normal to one person may still hurt another, meaning that moderators are required to engage with all cases carefully, precisely, and calmly. Our goal is to create a space that feels like a one-on-one conversation between the talents and the audience. To make that possible, the ideal situation is to remain as unseen as possible. We’re invisible most of the time, but when necessary, we step in. If we can continue to be a kind of quiet, shadow-like presence, we’d be truly happy.

item.title: NePoLaBo 3D Archive Special Session: “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live”
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Watch the 3D Archive With NePoLaBo!Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!The virtual concert “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live,” which was held in Holoearth on December 21, is available as a 3D archive.Cast: hololive 5th Generation “NePoLaBo” (Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan)A special 3D archive viewing session has been officially announced, where you can attend the concert once again! In this session, hololive 5th Generation “NePoLaBo” (Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan) will appear in Holoearth and participate together with everyone.Join the event once again—together with NePoLaBo!Watch together with NePoLaBo!3D Archive Special Session: “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live”Date & time(Schedule is subject to change.)An “Urya-oi!” Event Together with NePoLaBo!During this special 3D archive session, to celebrate the release of Momosuzu Nene’s all-out “wotagei” “Urya-oi!” gesture, a special event will be held where everyone joins together with the NePoLaBo members to fill the venue with chants of “Urya-oi! Urya-oi!”.Everyone together, let’s go! “Urya-oi! Urya-oi! Urya-oi! Urya-oi!”Feel free to practice in advance!Missed the show? Experience the Magic With the 3D Archive!With the 3D archive, where the entire venue has been preserved, you can relive the concert experience. View it from any angle in 360 degrees, focus on your oshi, take photos, and re-live your favorite moments.If you already purchased an ID Holder, you can participate again; if you do not yet have one, you can attend by purchasing it.Perhaps that certain someone may even casually drop in at some point, too…? Be sure not to miss out on the 3D archive! Dec 21, 2025 (Sun) 21:00 – Jan 4, 2026 (Sun) 23:59. (1) 8:00〜 (2) 12:00〜 (3) 19:00〜 (4) 21:00〜 (5) 23:00〜Watch Anytime During the Archive Period with the SPWN / ZAIKO Streaming ArchiveIf you are unable to attend in Holoearth, the stream archive is available with SPWN or ZAIKO! 3,500 yen (tax inclusive)

While savoring the afterglow of the performance, everyone also enjoyed a commemorative group photo session.The first song, “Hyper Jumpin’,” and MC Part 1 are available as a free preview on YouTube. Be sure to check it out!Outfits worn by the four NePoLaBo members are now available! In addition to the NePoLaBo Live Celebration T All Members Ver. designed by NePoLaBo, the “Pathfinder Outfits” inspired by the four members are also now on sale. ・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T All Members Ver. (No Signature) Dec 21 (Thu), 2025 from 20:00 (JST) ・Pathfinder Jacket SE Momosuzu Nene ・Pathfinder Jacket SE Omaru Polka ・Pathfinder Jacket SE Yukihana Lamy ・Pathfinder Jacket SE Shishiro Botan ・Pathfinder Sneakers SE Momosuzu Nene ・Pathfinder Sneakers SE Omaru Polka ・Pathfinder Sneakers SE Yukihana Lamy ・Pathfinder Sneakers SE Shishiro BotanKeep the sparkle of that night with you forever. If you do not yet have an ID Holder, you can join by purchasing one.You might even see that oshi casually “drop in” sometime… Do not miss out on the 3D archive! item.content:encoded: December 19, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) has announced a new merchandise collaboration with OTAKU in partnership with hololive production, featuring talents from hololive English -Advent- and hololive English -Justice.This collaboration introduces a brand new lineup of premium merchandise inspired by the concept of “hololive English Advent VS Justice,” designed to celebrate the unique personalities and worlds of the participating talents. Every item has been carefully crafted with exceptional quality.Products will be available for purchase and ready to ship from launch, while apparel items will be listed as pre-sale, with shipping scheduled for May 2026.For more information, please visit OTAKU’s official website and social media platforms.December 19, 2025 (9:00 AM EST) to December 31, 2025 (11:59 PM EST)Available worldwide (excluding mainland China) OTAKU is a lifestyle brand dedicated to creating high quality merchandise inspired by global fandom culture. With a strong focus on craftsmanship and design, OTAKU aims to deliver products that fans can proudly display and enjoy in their everyday lives.

item.title: Guide: Getting the Most Out of Events in Holoearth!
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Hi there! This is Anna Rocca from the Holoearth Tourism Agency.For today’s guide, I will introduce ways to better utilize Holoearth to improve your experience for NePoLaBo Live—enjoy using event items and gestures with everyone to really liven up the show!Please continue reading to be fully prepared for the day of the event!I will cover the following four categories this time:1. Interacting with other users with gestures.2. Using penlights with gestures.3. Adjusting options settings for a better experience.4. Using Photo Mode and participating in the photo contest.5. Adjusting “Visuals” for a better experience.One way to communicate with other users in Holoearth is with gestures. Press and hold the B key to open the gesture setup screen.Click “Edit gestures” to display a list of gestures you have purchased, then drag and move the ones you want to set.You can set up a total of 9 sets of gestures, each using the F1-F8 keys, so try switching between them depending on the situation.You can wave penlights by combining them with gestures. You can set penlight items you have purchased in the hotbar at the bottom of the screen to make them faster to use.After doing this, click the shortcut button or press the corresponding keyboard number to use it.By combining it with gestures such as those in the “Hype Up” series, you will be able to wave the penlights.Adjusting audio settings is also useful for making the most out of a concert experience. Press the Esc key to open the global options menu, then check the Sound section.By adjusting the Media volume, you can change the volume of the performance. Set it to a level that feels comfortable for you and enjoy the show!For NePoLaBo Live, photography is allowed. You will want to capture a special memory of your own, right?Press P to switch to Photo Mode. Since you can shoot from many different angles, it offers more flexibility than a standard screenshot.Also, a photo contest is planned for the NePoLaBo Live! Try posting your best shots on X with the hashtag #NePoLaBoHoloearthLive. Your photo might be featured on the official website, or you could even receive a special gift… For more details, check the URL below!Here, you can toggle features like “NaviRobo Display,” “Other Users’ Actions” (such as poppers or fireworks), and adjust the number of player models rendered in the area. Enjoy the performance in a way suited just for you!

item.title: An Unprecedented Challenge: Usada Pekora in DEATH STRANDING – A Conversation with KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS
item.author: cover_hirata
item.content:encoded: This project really reaffirmed for us just how strong KOJIMA PRODUCTIONS’ reach is in overseas markets. With Pekora having been nominated in the Creator category at The Game Awards, it felt like international audiences have really accepted Pekora not as a VTuber, but as a well-known individual in her own right. This allows us to move beyond the label of “VTuber” and break boundaries in a positive sense, and that, to me, was the most meaningful outcome of this collaboration. Looking at domestic impressions, the results were roughly in line with other collaborations of a similar scale. Overseas, however, impressions increased by as much as 650%. For hologra as well, comments from overseas viewers rose by 60%. These were extremely encouraging results for us.In addition, among KOJIMA PRODUCTION’s posts related to DEATH STRANDING, 28% included keywords associated with Pekora. We see this as a point where we were able to clearly communicate and deliver our value through the collaboration.

item.title: [hololive] A Special-Edition Magazine Is Set to Be Published! That hololive Member Appointed as Official Ambassador Graces the C...
Holoearth First-Timers & How to Participate in NePoLaBo Live
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Hi there! This is Anna Rocca from the Holoearth Tourism Agency.With the upcoming virtual concert “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” on Sunday, December 21, 2025, I put together a brief guide for those who are new to Holoearth or who may be unfamiliar with how to use the service.Please continue reading to be fully prepared for the day of the event!To participate in the NePoLaBo Live concert in Holoearth, there are four things you will need to do, as listed below!1. Download for PC (Windows). 2. Register an account with Google or Apple ID. 3. Purchase the “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder” item in the shop in Holoearth. 4. Enter the “NePoLaBo re:VISION Holoearth Live” area in Holoearth after 18:00 (JST) on Dec 21 (Sun).All that is needed to use Holoearth is a PC (Windows). No VR equipment is required. See the download page for PC spec requirements. Holoearth is only available for Windows.Feel free to use the following as a detailed reference guide for how to use Holoearth and participate!1: Installing Holoearth & Account CreationThe Holoearth application must first be downloaded and installed before using the service.Download the Holoearth launcher from the download pageDownload the Holoearth Launcher from the download page and install it.After installing the launcher, launch it via the “Holoearth Launcher” icon that was created.Click “Install” to begin the installation of the main Holoearth application. After installation, this button will become the “Start” button. When an update is available, the same button will change to “Update.”Launcher Installation TroubleshootingClick the gear icon in the upper right to open the launcher options menu, then choose “Support” from the menu and then “Open Log Folder” for the relevant error code that can be used when submitting a help inquiry.Account Creation & Logging InOnce installed, the launcher will display a “Start” button, which will open your web browser.If you do not yet have a Holoearth account, you will be prompted to create one, using either a Google account or Apple ID.Then, agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy and click Register to finish and log in.Afterward, when Holoearth is installed and launched correctly the title menu will show the animated PV, “Now, discover your other world,” and prompt you to “CLICK TO START.”On starting Holoearth for the first time, you will be asked to create your own avatar. Choose from a range of eyes, hairstyles, build options, skin tones, and more to create an avatar to your liking. You can change your avatar freely in Holoearth later, so feel free to think more about it later!After creating an avatar and entering Holoearth, you can control your avatar using a mouse and keyboard.The above controls can also be confirmed in-app via the HoloPhone menu (H key) by selecting “Help.”■ Character movement Move your avatar with WASD.Change camera angle with the mouse.■ Camera manipulation Zoom with the mouse wheel. Right click & drag to rotate your avatar.■ Opening menus Esc brings up the global settings menu. H opens the HoloPhone menu. Tab opens inventory.4: Purchase the ID Holder ItemIt is necessary to purchase the in-app “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder” in order to participate in NePoLaBo Live. 1. Choose Shop from the HoloPhone menu. 2. Purchase the event ID Holoder item. Note: This item is also included in the NePoLaBo Cheer Set bundles.After purchasing, you will be able to enter the concert venue in Holoearth. Note:5: How to Move to the Live Venue on Dec 211. Press H to bring up the HoloPhone menu and select “Change Area.”2. From the Area List, select the “Holoearth Live” area and click “Go.”Those who purchased the ID Holder will be able to also participate in the 3D archive after the first showing.Explore the event from different angles, take photos, and relive your favorite scenes. The 3D archive is shown at certain times of day during the archive viewing period according to the following daily schedule:Daily showtimes (JST) between Dec 21, 21:00 (JST) – Jan 4, 23:59 (JST) (1) 08:00~ (2) 12:00~ (3) 19:00~ (4) 21:00~ (5) 23:00~Note: The 3D archive may be played via the event venue screens for activities such as talent watch parties.6: More Tips for a Better ExperienceBy hitting the minus (“-“) key, you can hide the entire UI hud display to get an unobstructed view of the concert!And that wraps it up for getting started with Holoearth and participating in NePoLaBo Live. Next time, I will share tips on how to get the most out of the Holoearth concert experience, so please look forward to it!

item.title: ReGLOSS 初の単独ライブの感動を、全国のカラオケルームで！JOYSOUND「みるハコ」で1月1…
Beard Papa’s × hololive English -Justice- Collab Begins in the United States from January 3, 2026
item.author: Horii
item.content:encoded: December 16, 2025, Tokyo, JAPAN – COVER Corporation (Minato-ku, Tokyo; CEO: Tanigo Motoaki) is pleased to announce a collaboration between hololive English -Justice- and world-famous fresh and natural cream puff chain Beard Papa’s. Beginning January 3rd, 2026 for a limited time, U.S. Beard Papa’s locations will debut four talent-inspired cream puffs, each themed after a member of the hololive English -Justice-.“We’re thrilled to collaborate with hololive English -Justice- on bringing the talents to life through our handcrafted cream puffs,” said Mark Nathan, Marketing Director of Beard Papa’s. “Fans love the creativity and personality of hololive’s talents, and this collaboration allowed us to create completely new flavors guided by each member’s input, while maintaining Beard Papa’s signature quality.”For more information, please visit Beard Papa’s official website and social media platforms.Limited-Edition Cream Puffs made together with hololive English -Justice-During the collaboration, fans can try Beard Papa’s iconic freshly baked puffs paired with flavor profiles crafted to reflect the personalities, color palettes, and motifs of each talent. These limited-edition flavors will be available for purchase at participating Beard Papa’s stores nationwide.Every flavor was developed with input from the talents themselves, resulting in cream puffs that authentically capture each member’s unique style and character. The flavors and puffs are as follows:A striking pink-raspberry chocolate shell with Oreo crumble and blue nonpareils, reflecting Elizabeth’s bold flair and engaging presence.A bright, refreshing matcha-white chocolate dip topped with soft mini marshmallows, capturing Cecilia’s calm, green aesthetic and happy energy.Rich dark Belgian chocolate custard paired with handmade orange crumble and finishing chocolate, inspired by Gigi’s bright colors and fun energy.A strawberry-vanilla crumble coating crowned with a disc-chocolate “hat,” reflecting Raora’s charisma and playful charm.Collector Combo Sets for a Unique Fan ExperienceTo complement the four limited-edition hololive English -Justice- talent’s cream puffs, fans can also purchase exclusive collaboration sets available in three formats. The 4-Piece Set includes one of each talent flavor paired with a 4-sticker collectible pack featuring the hololive English -Justice- members.For guests looking to enjoy more, the 6-Piece Set includes all four talent puffs plus two Original Beard Papa’s cream puffs and comes with an exclusive acrylic keychain available only through this set.For the ultimate collector, the 12-Piece Set features two full 6-packs and is bundled with a limited-edition collaboration tote bag, making it the premium option for fans and families alike.The Beard Papa’s x hololive English -Justice- Collaboration Puffs will be available for a limited time at all participating Beard Papa’s locations across the U.S. Online orders will be available through the Beard Papa’s official app, website, and delivery partners in select markets.Originally founded in Osaka, Japan in 1999, Beard Papa’s has grown into a global dessert phenomenon known for its crisp shell, fluffy choux pastry, and all-natural cream fillings made fresh daily. With locations across the U.S. and over 550 stores worldwide, Beard Papa’s continues to delight fans with seasonal flavors, creative collaborations, and its signature tagline — “World’s Best Cream Puff.”

NePoLaBo Live Photo Contest Announcement
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!For the “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” virtual concert on December 21, 2025, we will hold a photo contest.We invite all to take in-app photos of hololive 5th Generation “NePoLaBo” (Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan) from various angles, and be sure to share your very best shots!NePoLaBo Live Support Campaign: Photo Contest!For “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live,” screenshots & social media posts are fully welcome. Share your perfect captures with us!Top entries will be featured on the official website and receive NePoLaBo Live commemorative merch. Selected posts will also be showcased on the official X account during the contest. 1. Hide “NaviRobo” and “Usernames” in the Options menu. 2. Capture in 1920×1080 (Full HD) or higher. 3. Post your screenshots on X with the hashtags (no entry limit!): English: #NePoLaBoHoloearthLive Japanese: #ねぽらぼホロアースライブTake as many as you like! Replay the concert anytime in the 3D archive (requires purchase of the ID Holder).Note: ・Turn “Motion Blur” off in Options (Esc key) to prevent photos from showing blur. ・In the concert venue you can use the O key shortcut to adjust the number of character models rendered and toggle other users’ effects (such as fireworks and poppers) ON/OFF. This helps reduce system load and offers more flexibility when taking photos.

item.title: [12/29 Revision: Time Extension] Announcement: “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” on Dec. 21
item.author: HoloearthWebsiteAdmin
item.content:encoded: Greetings from the Holoearth Management Team!On December 21, 2025 (JST) members of hololive 5th Generation (Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan) will hold a special virtual concert: “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live.”Become a virtual avatar and share the same space and experience as the NePoLaBo members. With a 360° front-row seat, choose any viewpoint and get up-close for an immersive concert experience where the talents are right before you within reach.After the show, relive the magic again with a 3D archive that fully preserves the entire concert space. All you need is a PC (Windows)—To coincide with the event, items such as member-themed accessories, penlights, and text plates will also be sold. Additionally, as part of a support campaign for the event, we plan to hold a photo contest, countdown campaigns, and more!Event name: “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Holoearth Live” Cast: Momosuzu Nene / Omaru Polka / Yukihana Lamy / Shishiro Botan Hashtag: #NePoLaBoHoloearthLive Date & time: Sunday, December 21, 2025 from 19:00 (JST)About re:VISION Holoearth LiveParticipating in the Holoearth Live event requires a Windows PC with Holoearth installed and a registered account, as well as the in-app item “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder.”Equipping your avatar with the “NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder” will grant access to the concert venue.[Exclusive Bonus Only for Holoearth]After the show, you can join a special Holoearth-exclusive segment—a unique opportunity to share the afterglow with NePoLaBo.Following the first showing, relive the concert in the 3D archive, where the entire event space is preserved. Explore the event from different perspectives, take photos, and relive your favorite scenes.The 3D archive will be held according to the designated daily schedule.Note: Holoearth is available only on Windows. In the concert venue you can use the O key shortcut to adjust the number of character models rendered and toggle other users’ effects (such as fireworks and poppers) ON/OFF. This helps reduce system load and offers more flexibility when taking photos.Due to popular demand, the event date has been extended to January 21, 2025 (Wed) at 23:59 (JST). NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder (Only one purchase per account.)・Participate in the “MC Special Segment” after the show. ・Relive the show with the 3D archive afterward. ・This is the same item included in the special sets below. ・1,500 HoloCoin (Premium)Bundled sets of items for cheering on NePoLaBo members will also be for sale. This value set lets you purchase items such as penlights and mascot character hair accessories together.Due to popular demand, the event date has been extended to January 21, 2025 (Wed) at 23:59 (JST). 4,500 HoloCoin (Premium) ・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder (single purchase only) ・Penlight Momosuzu Nene Type A (single purchase only) ・Nekko Hair Accessory ・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Momosuzu Nene Ver. (Signed) ・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder (single purchase only) ・Penlight Omaru Polka Type A (single purchase only) ・ZA-IN Hair Accessory ・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Omaru Polka Ver. (Signed) ・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder (single purchase only) ・Penlight Yukihana Lamy Type A (single purchase only) ・Yukimin Hair Accessory ・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Yukihana Lamy Ver. (Signed)Cheer Set Shishiro Botan Set details ・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION ID Holder (single purchase only) ・Penlight Shishiro Botan Type A (single purchase only) ・SSRB Hair Accessory ・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Shishiro Botan Ver. (Signed)Holoearth Live Event Time ScheduleFirst showing: Sunday, December 21, 2025 from 19:00 (JST).Daily showtimes (JST): (1) 08:00~ (2) 12:00~ (3) 19:00~ (4) 21:00~ (5) 23:00~This performance is pre-recorded.Screenshots from the entire performance may be posted on social media.Videos from the free portion (the first song and its MC) may be uploaded to YouTube. For other social media platforms, video posts are limited to within 30 seconds with no audio.The 3D archive may be played via the event venue screens for activities such as talent watch parties. Due to the nature of this content, which allows users to freely control the camera, it is produced in accordance with international safety standards and guidelines regarding visual display (such as flicker frequency and changes in brightness levels). However, certain user actions may still produce unexpectedly strong visual stimuli. In particular, individuals with a history of photosensitivity (such as photosensitive epilepsy or light-induced sensitivity), those who are sleep-deprived or unwell, and minors should avoid the actions listed below and exercise caution when viewing this content. Rapid and intense camera movements—such as panning quickly from side to side, tilting up and down, or repeatedly zooming in and out—may cause fast motion across the screen and strong flickering.Sudden Approaches to Light Sources Suddenly moving the camera close to bright lights used in the live performance (such as stage lighting, lasers, fireworks, or effects), or filling the screen with a bright light source, may cause abrupt changes in brightness. If you experience strong visual stimulation, dizziness, nausea, convulsions, or any vision abnormalities while viewing this content, stop immediately, look away from the screen, and take a break. If symptoms do not improve, promptly seek medical attention.Please view this content at your own risk with thorough understanding of the above potential hazards. We kindly ask for your understanding and cooperation to ensure safe usage. Mirrored streaming of this performance is strictly prohibited. Uploading videos of the paid portion of this performance (after the first song and its MC) to social media or YouTube is prohibited.Watch via Streaming Ticket SPWN, ZAIKO Dec 11 (Thu), 2025 22:00 – Jan 21 (Wed), 2025 22:00 (JST) Until Wednesday, January 21, 2026 at 23:59 (JST) 3,500 JPY (tax inclusive)This will be a video stream provided through SPWN and ZAIKO. Holoearth’s in-app features will not be available.The archive will be available for viewing once it is prepared following the performance. During the archive viewing period the show can be viewed any number of times.As soon as the archive viewing period ends the archive footage will no longer be accessible.An additional handling fee of 220 JPY will apply when purchasing this ticket.YouTube Free-to-View SegmentThe opening portion of the live show will be streamed for free on YouTube. Videos from the free segment (the first song and its MC) may be posted on YouTube. For other social media platforms, video posts are limited to 30 seconds or less with no audio.Limited-Time Digital MerchandiseDue to popular demand, the sales period has been extended to January 21, 2025 (Wed) at 23:59 (JST). ・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Momosuzu Nene Ver. (No Signature) ・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Omaru Polka Ver. (No Signature) ・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Yukihana Lamy Ver. (No Signature) ・NePoLaBo Live Celebration T Shishiro Botan Ver. (No Signature) ・Nekko Hair Accessory ・Yukimin Hair Accessory ・Penlight Momosuzu Nene Live ver. ・Penlight Omaru Polka Live ver. ・Penlight Yukihana Lamy Live ver. ・Penlight Shishiro Botan Live ver. Note: Penlights are held in both hands when used. These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room or My Space. ・Momosuzu Nene re:VISION Outfit Acrylic Stand (L) ・Omaru Polka re:VISION Outfit Acrylic Stand (L) ・Yukihana Lamy re:VISION Outfit Acrylic Stand (L) ・Shishiro Botan re:VISION Outfit Acrylic Stand (L) ・NePoLaBo Live re:VISION Key Visual Acrylic Panel ・For Momosuzu Nene ・For Yukihana LamyNew Items for Hyping Up the Show! From Dec 11 (Thu), 2025 at 21:30 (Schedule is subject to change.) ・Penlight Momosuzu Nene Type A ・Penlight Omaru Polka Type A ・Penlight Yukihana Lamy Type A ・Penlight Shishiro Botan Type A Note: Penlights are held in both hands when used. These items cannot be used in the Simulation Room or My Space. ・Momosuzu Nene Text Plate 1 × 3 (Nenechi / Kon-Nene~! / Waku Waku! / Energy Drink! / HAAAN) ・Omaru Polka Text Plate 1 × 3 (Polka / Omarun / Where’s Polka? / Otsu-Pol / POLMAO) ・Yukihana Lamy Text Plate 1 × 3 (Lamy-chan / Kon-Lamy~ / Otsu-Lamy~ / Can’t love! / Stooop) ・Shishiro Botan Text Plate 1 × 3 (Shishiron / GG / La-lion♪ / Sasu-Shishi / poi) ・NePoLaBo Momosuzu Nene Pose ・NePoLaBo Omaru Polka Pose ・NePoLaBo Yukihana Lamy Pose ・NePoLaBo Shishiro Botan Pose From Dec 18 (Thu), 2025 after maintenance. (Schedule is subject to change.) ・Christmas PoppersConcert event shirts will take shape in the real world. The Live Celebration T-shirts, designed by NePoLaBo in Holoearth, are now available on Amazon! They are unique items that connect two different worlds: the virtual and the real.

item.title: hololive announces huge slate of free events for the 2025 holiday season
item.author: Charlotte Davis
item.content:encoded: Cover Corporation has officially unveiled its comprehensive schedule for the 2025-2026 holiday season, headlined by a massive free countdown concert and the return of the fan-favorite New Year's Eve variety program.
